---
name: Promotion request
about: Queue a repo event or asset for draft generation and Telegram approval
labels: share
---

## What should be promoted?

- Release
- Merged PR
- Issue / milestone
- Demo / screenshot / report asset
- Docs / trust update
- Other:

## Source link

Link the release, PR, issue, docs page, asset, or repo section that proves the claim.

## Why now?

What makes this worth sharing now?

## Target audience

Who is this for?

- practitioners
- contributors
- OSS maintainers
- security-minded developers
- other:

## Requested channels

- Telegram
- LinkedIn
- X / Bluesky
- GitHub release notes
- Other:

## Primary repo link target

What link should the post drive people to?

## Supporting proof links

Add release notes, PRs, docs links, demo links, or screenshots.

- 
- 
- 

## Asset reference

If this needs an image/demo/report, link it here.

## Draft angle

What is the simplest truthful story to tell?

## Risk / review notes

Anything sensitive, easy to overclaim, or only safe for Telegram-first?

## Hard blockers check

- [ ] No `do-not-amplify` label is involved
- [ ] Assets are current and safe to share
- [ ] The request does not depend on unverified third-party praise
- [ ] The claim set can be supported from repo evidence
